description: The canonical CaptureAutoSave type in workflows.ts:68-73 specifies return type Result<NoteFileSaved, SaveError>. The implementation in pipeline.ts:63 returns Result<CaptureAutoSaveResult, SaveError> where CaptureAutoSaveResult = NoteFileSaved | EmptyNoteDiscarded. This widens the Ok channel beyond what the canonical type permits. REQ-017 explicitly states the return type must be Promise<Result<NoteFileSaved, SaveError>> and that EmptyNoteDiscarded is handled internally. Returning EmptyNoteDiscarded in the Ok channel forces callers to discriminate on the Ok value, violating the canonical contract.
